meaning: adj.[地理]热带以外的,发现于较高纬度地带的
examples: Extratropical Southern Hemisphere Cyclones: Harbingers of Climate Change?
SONGDA finally turned into an extratropical cyclone as it reached the southern coast of Honshu, Japan.
